risk_note.tr: Adimlar Microsoft Support 'Fix Wi-Fi connection issues in Windows' belgesinden alinmistir. Microsoft alintisi: 'Network reset should be the last step you try.' Tum ag adaptorleri ve ayarlari silinir, varsayilana doner. VPN ve sanal switch'ler yeniden kurulmali.
risk_note.en: Steps sourced from Microsoft Support 'Fix Wi-Fi connection issues in Windows'. Microsoft quote: 'Network reset should be the last step you try.' All network adapters and settings are removed and reset to defaults. VPN and virtual switches must be reinstalled.

body.tr: Microsoft: 'Network reset should be the last step you try. Consider using it if the steps above don't help to get you connected. Additionally, after using network reset, you might need to reinstall and set up other networking software you might be using, such as VPN client software or virtual switches from Hyper-V.'
body.en: Microsoft: 'Network reset should be the last step you try. Consider using it if the steps above don't help to get you connected. Additionally, after using network reset, you might need to reinstall and set up other networking software you might be using, such as VPN client software or virtual switches from Hyper-V.'

title.tr: Win11: Settings > Network & Internet > Advanced network settings > Network reset
title.en: Win11: Settings > Network & Internet > Advanced network settings > Network reset

title.tr: Win10: Settings > Network & Internet > Status > Network reset
title.en: Win10: Settings > Network & Internet > Status > Network reset

body.tr: Microsoft: 'Network reset removes any network adapters you have installed and the settings for them. After your PC restarts, any network adapters are reinstalled, and the settings for them are set to the defaults.' PC otomatik 5 dk sonra restart eder.
body.en: Microsoft: 'Network reset removes any network adapters you have installed and the settings for them. After your PC restarts, any network adapters are reinstalled, and the settings for them are set to the defaults.' PC auto-restarts after 5 min.

body.tr: Microsoft 'How to reset TCP/IP by using the NetShell utility' belgesindeki adimlar. Yonetici PowerShell: netsh winsock reset; netsh int ip reset; ipconfig /flushdns; ipconfig /registerdns. Restart sonrasi geli.
body.en: Steps from Microsoft 'How to reset TCP/IP by using the NetShell utility'. Admin PowerShell: netsh winsock reset; netsh int ip reset; ipconfig /flushdns; ipconfig /registerdns. Reboot after.

steps.command: netsh winsock reset; netsh int ip reset
